---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
rm(list = ls())
source("validation.R")
```


```{r}
severe <- readRDS("data/reconstructed_ipd/Severe_RSV_LRTI.rds")
```


```{r}
severe$ipd
```


```{r}
plot(severe$est$nirsevimab)
severe$diagnostics$precision_nirsev
severe$diagnostics$ks_nirsev
```

```{r}
kampann_plot(
    ipd = s_ipd,
    arm_levels = c("placebo", "RSVpreF"),
    title = "Kampmann 2023: Severe RSV-LRTI"
) 

```


```{r}
event_count_validation(severe)$nirsevimab
```
